message:
chore: update beads issues, refine cx scope and priority scheduler

- Update beads issue tracker state
- Refine capability scope narrowing logic (cx/scope.rs)
- Adjust priority scheduler tuning parameters (runtime/scheduler/priority.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -291,7 +291,7 @@ impl<P: Policy> Scope<'_, P> {
         f: F,
     ) -> Result<(TaskHandle<Fut::Output>, StoredTask), SpawnError>
     where
-        Caps: cap::HasSpawn + Send + Sync,
+        Caps: cap::HasSpawn + Send + Sync + 'static,
         F: FnOnce(Cx<Caps>) -> Fut + Send + 'static,
         Fut: Future + Send + 'static,
         Fut::Output: Send + 'static,
